cta.title: Got a Success Story?
cta.description: If InTransparency helped you land an opportunity, we'd love to hear about it. Your verified story could inspire other students.

0.name: Marco Bianchi
0.quote: InTransparency completely changed my job search. Instead of sending hundreds of applications, recruiters found ME through my verified projects. I had 3 job offers within 2 weeks!
0.story: Marco uploaded his institution-verified cloud computing projects to InTransparency. Within days, AWS recruiters discovered his portfolio through AI search and reached out directly. He accepted an offer without ever submitting a traditional application.

1.name: Sofia Romano
1.quote: The verification system was a game-changer. Recruiters could see my actual work from academic courses, not just claims on a CV. It gave me so much credibility.
1.story: Sofia showcased her machine learning projects from her Master's thesis. Google recruiters used InTransparency's course-level search to find students with specific ML experience. Sofia's verified projects stood out, leading to interviews and an offer.

2.name: Luca Ferrari
2.quote: I got hired based on my final year project! The recruiter saw it on InTransparency, loved the technical depth, and fast-tracked my interview. I started working just 2 weeks after graduating.
2.story: Luca's institution-verified distributed systems project caught Microsoft's attention. The detailed project documentation and 30/30 grade gave recruiters confidence in his abilities. He received an offer before most of his classmates even started applying.

0.title: Right to Access
0.description: Request a copy of all your personal data we hold, in machine-readable format.

1.title: Right to Erasure
1.description: Delete your account and all associated data permanently within 30 days.

2.title: Right to Rectification
2.description: Correct or update any inaccurate personal information at any time.

3.title: Right to Restrict Processing
3.description: Limit how we process your data while maintaining your account.

4.title: Right to Data Portability
4.description: Transfer your data to another service in a structured format.

5.title: Right to Object
5.description: Object to processing of your data for marketing or other purposes.

examples.title: ITS That Could Benefit
examples.subtitle: Examples of ITS that would increase student placement through verified marketplace

0.question: How does the marketplace help our students?
0.answer: Companies browse 10K+ verified graduates and proactively reach out to students with matching skills. Students don't apply - they get discovered. Your institutional verification gives them a competitive edge. 25% more placements than traditional job boards.

1.question: Is it really free forever?
1.answer: Yes, 100% free. All 4 services (Discovery, Matching, Verification, Analytics) included. Companies pay €10 per contact - this finances the platform. You save €2.500/year vs AlmaLaurea.

2.question: How does verification work?
2.answer: Students manually upload projects and you verify them through our simple dashboard. For larger institutions, we can set up API integration (contact us for details). Zero IT work for you after setup.

3.question: Can we add Career Day tools?
3.answer: Yes! Optional Premium Embed add-on (€500/year) includes Career Day platform with QR codes, interview booking, and branded widgets. But core marketplace is always free. See pricing page for details.

4.question: How do we track placement for MIUR reporting?
4.answer: Free analytics dashboard shows: "47 days avg time-to-hire", "23 students hired via platform", "85% placement boost". Export reports for MIUR with verifiable data.

5.question: What if students don't get discovered?
5.answer: Analytics show you early warnings: "Student X: 0 views in 30 days - skills mismatch?" You can intervene early, update skills/projects, or offer career counseling. Prevention vs reaction.

finalCTA.title: Ready to Get Your ITS Students Hired?
finalCTA.subtitle: Join the free marketplace connecting verified ITS graduates to companies actively hiring. Setup in 5 minutes. Zero costs. Track placement success.
finalCTA.benefits: ✓ €0 forever  ✓ 10K+ companies  ✓ 87% avg placement  ✓ Track impact for MIUR

model.title: Our Transparency Model
model.subtitle: Four pillars of complete transparency across the platform

0.title: 1. Verified Competencies
0.description: Hard and soft skills verified through institutional data and project analysis.

items.0: Hard skills: Verified through projects, code, designs, research
items.1: Soft skills: Analyzed from teamwork, leadership, presentations
items.3: Verified data outperforms traditional self-reported methods

1.title: 2. Explainable AI
1.description: Every match shows exactly WHY. Companies can add notes with feedback.

items.1: Clear explanations ("Your Python project matches 3/4 requirements")
items.2: Company notes: "Add AWS experience and you're perfect"
items.3: 85% higher trust in transparent AI (EU studies)

2.title: 3. Bidirectional Transparency
2.description: Companies state requirements clearly. Students get actionable feedback. No guessing games.

items.0: Companies explicitly state what skills/knowledge they need
items.1: Companies leave notes on profiles with specific feedback
items.2: Students know exactly what to improve (e.g., "Add AWS experience")
items.3: 25% less hiring bias with transparent requirements

3.title: 4. Consent & Audit Trails
3.description: Complete control over data. See all company notes and feedback on your profile.

items.1: See all company notes and what they're looking for

items.0: See which companies viewed your profile
items.2: Know exactly what skills jobs require
items.3: Trust that your skills are fairly represented

items.2: See actual project work before contacting

hero.title: Resumes Are Broken.
hero.description:
Anyone can claim "Proficient in React" or "Expert in Python" on a resume.
Recruiters waste time interviewing unqualified candidates.
Students with real skills get overlooked because they don't have fancy internships.

items.2: ❌ Rewards good writers, not good builders

whyDifferent.title: Why InTransparency is
whyDifferent.subtitle: We're building a platform where skills are verified, matches are explained, and requirements are transparent.

0.title: Self-Reported Skills:
0.description: Without institutional verification, skills can be hard to validate. This leads to a 30% mismatch rate in traditional hiring.

1.title: Limited Explanations:
1.description: When matching isn't explained, students don't know what to improve. 70% of candidates want more transparency from AI hiring tools.

2.title: Unclear Requirements:
2.description: Vague job descriptions make it hard for candidates to know what's really needed. Clear requirements reduce bias by 25%.

3.title: Information Gaps:
3.description: Without feedback loops, students and institutions lack market insights. Better data improves outcomes for everyone.

0.title: Institution-Verified Skills:
0.description: Hard skills (Python, AutoCAD, Excel) and soft skills (teamwork, leadership, communication) verified through projects, courses, and institutional data.

1.title: Explainable AI:
1.description: Every match explains WHY ("Your Python project matches 3/4 requirements"). No black boxes. 85% higher trust in transparent AI per EU studies.

2.title: Bidirectional Transparency:
2.description: Companies specify clear requirements. Students see exactly what jobs need. Institutions track search trends (e.g., "Excel searched 89x"). 25% less hiring bias with transparent criteria.

3.title: Full Audit Trails:
3.description: Students see which companies viewed their profile. Institutions see hiring patterns. GDPR Article 15 compliant. 20-30% boost in placements via data-driven decisions.

result.title: The Result

0.label: Average time to hire (vs 42+ days traditional)

result.tagline: Transparency builds trust. Trust builds better matches. Better matches build careers.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We're building the world's first verified project portfolio platform where students prove their skills through what they've actually built, not what they claim they can do.

paragraphs.0: InTransparency was born from frustration. Our founders watched talented students with incredible institutional projects get rejected from jobs because their resumes didn't list "2+ years experience" or a FAANG internship.
paragraphs.1: Meanwhile, companies complained about hiring candidates who looked great on paper but couldn't code. The disconnect was obvious: resumes reward good storytelling, not good building.
paragraphs.2: We asked a simple question: What if students could show their work instead of just listing it? What if recruiters could see verified projects with complete skill analysis (hard + soft), and institution endorsements?

0.title: Verification Over Claims
0.description: Institution-backed projects in all formats, complete skill analysis, and endorsements prove skills are real.

1.title: Proof of Work
1.description: Show what you've built, not what you say you can build. Code speaks louder than bullet points.

2.title: Talent Over Pedigree
2.description: A brilliant project from a state school beats a mediocre resume from an Ivy League.

3.title: Transparency Always
3.description: No hidden algorithms. Students see who viewed their profile. Companies see verified data.

hero.title: Pricing
hero.subtitle: Free for students and universities. Currently in pilot — founding partners get free access.

founding.title: Founding Partner Program
founding.subtitle: We're in pilot with Università di Bergamo. Join as a Founding Partner and get free unlimited access to verified graduates while we build critical mass — in exchange for your feedback and a testimonial.

features.0: Unlimited free contacts during the pilot phase (Q4 2025 – Q1 2026)
features.1: Permanent 50% discount on credits after the pilot ends
features.2: Your logo featured as a Founding Partner on the platform
features.3: Direct input on features — we build what you need

student.title: Always Free
student.subtitle: Build your verified portfolio. Get discovered by companies.

institute.title: Free Forever
institute.subtitle: Verify student projects. Track placement outcomes. Zero cost vs AlmaLaurea.

0.a: Two ways: (1) If your institution is a partner, we send an email invitation. Students click to consent and their profile is created from verified institution data. (2) If independent, students upload projects + select courses, and we verify them to create their complete profile. Both ways: 100% free, consent-based, < 5 minutes.

1.q: Is the marketplace really free for institutions?
1.a: Yes! The core marketplace (verification, discovery, matching, analytics) is 100% free forever. Institutions supply talent, we handle everything else: profile creation, company search, placement tracking. Zero cost vs AlmaLaurea €2,500/year. You only pay for optional enterprise features (API, white-label).

2.q: Can institutions add Career Day tools or branded widgets?
2.a: Yes! Optional Premium Embed add-on (€500/year) includes Career Day platform (QR codes, interview booking) and branded website widgets. But the core marketplace is always free. Most institutions start with free tier, then add premium features if needed. Contact sales for details.

3.q: How is this better than AlmaLaurea?
3.a: AlmaLaurea charges universities €2,500/year and just collects self-reported CVs. InTransparency is FREE forever and verifies skills via AI + actual projects. Plus ALL students get exposure (not just those who update their CV), and companies get better data (verified portfolios vs self-reported).

4.q: Do ALL students get exposure or just top performers?
4.a: ALL students. Traditional headhunters only contact the top 5%. We give EVERY student a profile that companies can discover. This dramatically improves placement rates across your entire graduating class, not just the stars.

5.a: Companies browse the entire database for free - unlimited searching, filtering, and AI candidate search. You only pay €10 when you decide to contact a specific candidate. No subscriptions, no monthly fees, credits never expire.

assessments.title: Three Validated Assessments

0.name: Big Five Personality

whatYouGet.title: What You Get

benefits.2: Percentile rankings vs. institution peer group

benefits.5: Helps recruiters find you for culture fit

whatYouGet.subtitle: Be among the first to get certified

0.q: How long does the assessment take?
0.a: Approximately 30 minutes total for all three assessments. You can pause and resume anytime.

1.a: Yes. Our assessments are based on peer-reviewed research and validated by I-O psychologists.

2.a: Yes! Your certification displays prominently on your profile and in recruiter search results.

3.q: What if I'm not happy with my results?
3.a: You can retake the assessment once per year. Many students see improvement after gaining experience.

4.a: Yes. We're partnered with 500+ companies across Europe and expanding globally.

5.q: How is this different from LinkedIn assessments?
5.a: Ours are psychometric (personality/behavior) not skill quizzes. Plus, we provide percentile rankings vs. peers.

0.label: Internships activated every year in Italy

1.label: Interns who don't continue with the company

paragraphs.0: Every year, hundreds of thousands of young Italians start internship programs hoping to build a career. However, the current system doesn't always manage to recognize the skills acquired during education, creating a gap between training and job opportunities.
paragraphs.1: There is often a missing link between what students can do and what companies are looking for. Without proper tools to surface verified competencies, talent risks going unnoticed.
paragraphs.2: Universities and training institutions, despite investing in quality education, often lack the tools to monitor employment outcomes for their students. This lack of data makes it difficult to improve the system.

0.title: Skills Come First
0.description: A student's value should be measured by what they can do — verified projects, real competencies, institutional endorsements — not just by their educational path.

1.title: Investing in Talent Discovery
1.description: Companies looking for qualified candidates deserve effective tools to find them. A system based on verified skills makes the process more efficient for everyone.

2.title: Connecting Education and Work
2.description: We believe universities and companies can collaborate better. When student competencies are visible and verified, matching becomes natural and faster.

3.title: Transparency Improves the System
3.description: When placement data is visible, when skills are verified and outcomes are tracked, every actor in the system can make better decisions.

0.title: Transparency in Every Interaction
0.description: Every interaction on our platform is traceable. Companies see verified skills. Students see who's interested. Institutions see outcomes.

1.title: Verified Skills, Real Projects
1.description: We believe a 30/30 thesis project tells a lot about a candidate. Our platform puts concrete, institution-verified work first.

2.title: A Fair System for Everyone
2.description: We're building a marketplace where value goes to those who create it. Every actor — students, universities, companies — finds a sustainable and transparent model.

3.title: Meritocracy Based on Real Projects
3.description: No name-brand university bias. Your verified projects speak for themselves. The best work wins, regardless of background.

cta.title: Let's Build the Future Together
cta.subtitle: Help us create a world where talent is recognized, skills are verified, and every young person has the opportunity to be noticed.

socialProof.title: Built for Italian Universities and ITS Academies
socialProof.subtitle: The only platform connecting verified student talent with employers — free for students, free for universities, pay-per-contact for companies.

hero.title: Hire Engineers Who Can Actually Build Things
hero.subtitle: See verified project portfolios — CAD models, FEA analyses, mechatronics prototypes — not just CVs. From Italian universities and ITS academies.

pain.title: Why Engineering Hiring Is Broken
pain.cantCompete: You can't compete with Siemens or ABB for talent — but you need 3 engineers this year
pain.cvsDontShow: CVs don't show if someone can actually design a circuit or run a simulation
pain.costPerHire: AlmaLaurea costs €2,500/year even if you only hire 2 people

solution.title: See the Work, Not Just the Words
solution.subtitle: InTransparency shows you what engineering students actually built — verified by their professors.

verifiedProjects.title: Verified Project Portfolios
verifiedProjects.desc: See actual CAD designs, simulation results, and prototypes — each verified by the student's institution.

technicalPortfolios.title: Technical Depth Analysis
technicalPortfolios.desc: AI analyses complexity, tools used, and innovation level of each engineering project.

institutionBacked.title: University-Verified Grades
institutionBacked.desc: Grades normalized across universities using the Bologna Process. Compare students from different institutions fairly.

personalityInsights.title: Team Fit Assessment
personalityInsights.desc: DISC personality profiles show how candidates work in teams — critical for project-based engineering work.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing for SMEs
pricing.perContact: per contact — no subscription, no annual fee

hero.title: Hire Consultants With Verified Soft Skills
hero.subtitle: DISC personality profiles, normalized grades, and institution-verified competencies. Stop guessing about soft skills.

pain.title: The Consulting Hiring Problem
pain.tooManyCvs: 500 CVs per analyst opening — no way to filter for actual potential
pain.cantVerifySoftSkills: Communication, teamwork, leadership — impossible to verify from a CV
pain.gradesNotComparable: A 28/30 at Bocconi isn't the same as a 28/30 at a regional university

solution.title: Data-Driven Consulting Recruitment
solution.subtitle: Go beyond CVs with verified personality profiles, normalized grades, and institutional endorsements.

discProfiles.title: DISC Personality Profiles
discProfiles.desc: See communication style, motivators, stressors, and ideal team role — assessed and verified, not self-reported.

normalizedGrades.title: Bologna Process Grade Normalization
normalizedGrades.desc: Compare candidates from different universities fairly. Grades normalized to ECTS standards across 6 European systems.

verifiedSkills.title: Institution-Verified Competencies
verifiedSkills.desc: Soft skills scored and verified by the university — communication, teamwork, leadership, problem solving, and more.

decisionPack.title: Decision Pack PDF
decisionPack.desc: Generate a comprehensive candidate comparison PDF with all profiles, scores, and insights — perfect for hiring committees.
